description: Venezuelan criminal organization founded by José Antonio Tovar Colina alias 'El Picure' in 2008, initially operating in Guárico and Aragua as a car theft gang. Known as one of the first megagangs, it engages in drug trafficking, extortion, homicide, and kidnapping. The group opposes Nicolás Maduro's rule and has threatened opposition leader María Corina Machado. It remains active with an estimated 700 members.
